objective: Re-authorize Argo execution of the Clotho Phase 1 implementation plan v14 (content address sha256:f152f1663234a393aa8a0dd441d2631a9cf4a6d50773d719178f38f483da3426; released by The Eye via PR #120, squash-merge 4fdecf4; extends authz-006 which authorized v13). v14 = v13 + the single narrow amendment AM-41 (The Eye's enforced-source-profile ruling for the D33 lexical scanner): the shared D33 classifier/resolver is required correct ONLY over a closed, MECHANICALLY ENFORCED module-lexical source profile, and MUST reject every out-of-profile construct DETERMINISTICALLY with the stable diagnostic 'unsupported-module-lexical-profile' (no edge, no closure result, no coverage claim). The supported profile and the EXACT enumerable out-of-profile set (b1-b6: bare CR/U+2028/U+2029; hashbang; HTML comments; string line-continuations/octal escapes; string-literal specifier names; unterminated/truncated forms) are frozen in the plan; the bar is TOTAL correctness over an explicit subset that refuses everything else — NOT a complete ECMAScript lexer/parser, and NOT an override of the codex seat. AM-41 also binds original-uncollapsed-component containment in the shared resolver (lstat before any '..'-collapse) + a fixture. v14 differs from the already-authorized v13 at EXACTLY one block (the Task 4a D33 shared-grammar clause, a 62-line insertion); every other frozen decision is reaffirmed unchanged (AM-40 PACKAGE_ROOTS; advisory / non-sandboxed posture per AM-35..AM-39; D17/AM-17; D24/D26/D31; D32; the D33 accepted-form set; zero-dependency; spine read-only). Judge v14 on ITS OWN advisory/non-sandbox terms — do NOT require it to prove loader isolation, and do NOT require a full ES parser beyond the frozen closed-profile bar. Approve ONLY if the plan is implementation-ready and consistent with its governing spec (v2.8, advisory posture), the repository's trust model (fail-closed, closed sets, spine read-only, advisory-only Clotho), and its own decisions and exit criteria — with AM-41 correctly defining the scanner's enforced correctness domain.

blockers: codex has required edits: Remove the Task 5 requirement that `clotho/weave.mjs` have a Node shebang and require that file to contain no hashbang; invoke it explicitly through Node/package commands instead, updating any tests or documentation that expect direct shebang execution.

codex has hard stops: Task 5 requires `clotho/weave.mjs` to contain a Node shebang, while AM-41 requires the shared D33 scanner to reject any hashbang anywhere with `unsupported-module-lexical-profile`. Because `weave.mjs` is an orchestrator closure entry point, its required D33 closure derivation and publication-time re-derivation must fail, making Tasks 5–7 unexecutable as written.

authorization.note: Fail-closed: see gate.blockers and seat decisions.
